implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Implemented seven concrete payload types (adr, review_report, build_outcome, pattern, warning, seed_module, document)
Each type declares canonical payload_type as ClassVar
DocumentPayload accepts payloads with no type-specific fields
ReviewReportPayload enforces required verdict field with clear error message
All types inherit BasePayload validators (identifier, supersession, domain_tags, source_ref)
All files pass ruff linting with zero errors

completion_promises.criterion_text: Each type's payload_type is its canonical underscore name (ASSUM-004).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented seven concrete payload types in src/fleet_memory/payloads/models.py, each declaring payload_type as a ClassVar with its canonical underscore name: adr, review_report, build_outcome, pattern, warning, seed_module, document. All types verified in tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: An ADR for project guardkit / id ADR_SP_007 yields natural key adr:guardkit:ADR_SP_007.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented ADRPayload with payload_type='adr'. Test test_adr_natural_key_format verifies natural key construction as 'adr:guardkit:adr_sp_007' (using lowercase identifier as required by BasePayload validator pattern ^[a-z0-9_]+$).

completion_promises.criterion_text: A generic Document yields document:<project>:<identifier> and is accepted with no type-specific fields.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented DocumentPayload with payload_type='document' and no type-specific fields beyond BasePayload. Test test_document_accepts_no_type_specific_fields verifies it constructs natural key correctly and accepts payloads with only BasePayload fields.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A ReviewReport built with no verdict is rejected; the error names the missing field.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented ReviewReportPayload with required 'verdict' field. Test test_review_report_requires_verdict verifies that ValidationError is raised when verdict is missing, and error message contains 'verdict'. Test test_review_report_with_verdict_accepted verifies acceptance when verdict is provided.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Every type inherits the underscore-only / supersession / domain-tag / source-ref conventions from BasePayload (no re-declaration).
completion_promises.evidence: All seven concrete types subclass BasePayload without re-declaring validators or shared fields. Test test_all_types_inherit_base_validators verifies identifier validation (IdentifierValidationError), supersession validation (SupersessionValidationError), and inherited fields (domain_tags, source_ref, version, supersedes) work correctly on concrete types.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/payloads/' and 'ruff check tests/unit/test_payloads.py' - both report 'All checks passed!' with zero errors.
